title: Develop AI solutions with Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
summary: Learn how to develop AI solutions using Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL, including vector search and query optimization for RAG pipelines and semantic retrieval.

sections.title: Develop AI solutions with Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
sections.summary: Learn how to develop AI solutions using Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL, including vector search and query optimization for RAG pipelines and semantic retrieval.

lessons.title: Build queries for Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to connect to Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL, use the SDK to perform CRUD operations, and write SQL queries to retrieve document data for AI applications.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/build-query-azure-cosmos-db/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Build queries for Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL

lessons.title: Implement vector search on Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to implement vector search capabilities in Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL to build AI applications that perform semantic similarity queries.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-vector-search-azure-cosmos-db/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement vector search on Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL

lessons.title: Optimize query performance for Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to optimize query performance and reduce costs for Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL workloads by configuring indexes and selecting consistency levels.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/optimize-query-performance-azure-cosmos-db/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Optimize query performance for Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Develop AI solutions with Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Develop AI solutions with Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
